creator: venture37@geeklan.co.uk
text:
An alternative to ports/175783, instead of making building with pthread support explicit,
make it a selectable option which is off by default.
While here also clean some errors reported by portlint.

Port maintainer (pgsql@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
